Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Order For Arbitration
Off Calendar May-09-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Plaintinff Wendy Lorizio's Motion to Vacate Order for Arbitration is scheduled this day. There being no appearance nor an objection tentative ruling to grant motion is adopted. Motion is ordered granted. Case is ordered removed from Judicial Arbitration. Order signed. Court ordered a Jury Trial Date Set on 11/10/2008 at 9:30 AM, in Department 206. Court to give notice of the Trial Date and Mandatory Settlement Conference. Court ordered a Mediation Order to Show Cause scheduled on 7/9/2008 at 10:00 AM, in Department 212. Proceedings reported by: Leticia Perez, CSR#3689 (212)

PRE-ARBITRATION SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-25-2008 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Answers To Interrogatories And Responses To Identification And Production Of Documents And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Mar-18-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. Defendant Phronsa Cruz's motion to compel responses to form interrogatories and request for production of documents is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff is ordered to serve complete verified responses without objections and produce documents within 15 days of notice of this order. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $490 are to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN. Not reported.
